programs.title: Xploration Awesome Planet S6 - "Sustainable Leaders"
programs.desc: In this episode, we’ll visit a facility in Reno that makes biofuel for United Airlines aircraft.

programs.title: Angry Planet S2 - "Hot and Cold Crystals"
programs.desc: Miners in Chihauhau, Mexico, has just discovered an amazing sight. The Mexican authorities are only opening up the cavern to scientists and film crews – “Angry Planet” plans to be one of the first in!

programs.title: Angry Planet S2 - "Thunder Down Under"
programs.desc: In the first week of December – the height of storm season in Australia, we plan to travel with Jimmy Deguara, the most experienced of Australian stormchasers.

programs.title: Angry Planet S2 - "Hawaii"
programs.desc: We have filmed extensively in Hawaii, filming big-wave surfing at the famous Banzai Pipeline on Oahu’s North Shore, and filming George surfing with the “Hawaian Fire” firefighters. We have also filmed at the Hawaii Tsunami Institute and in Hilo.

programs.title: Angry Planet S2 - "Italia Wild"
programs.desc: Italy is one of the very few nations in the world that regularly gets three major extreme natural phenomena – volcanos, flooding, and avalanches. The most recent eruption was in November 2006.

programs.title: Skuld: A Look into the Future S1 - "Energy Globe Award 21st - Part 2"
programs.desc: Watch the second part of a feature on the second award ceremony for sustainability projects that can change the world.
